strings.NT_EQUIP_BROTHERRING_PICKUP: All Stats Up, Cannot be removed by normal means.
strings.NT_EQUIP_BROTHERRING_DESC: Increases Attack Speed, Skill Cooldown Reduction, Critical Damage, Damage, Health, Jump Strength, Movement Speed, Regeneration, Shield, Critical Strike Change and Armor by 10%. But cannot be removed unless a cleansing pool is used.
strings.NT_EQUIP_BROTHERRING_DENIED: The Bulwark's Ring prohibits the exchange...
